claim_text: LLM acceleration has moved from generic Transformer kernels toward state/cache/serving problems: KV residency, prefill/decode overlap, sparse attention, long-context memory, and token-level silicon metrics.

claim_text: Neural rendering and 3DGS have become a real cross-venue accelerator frontier, centered on sorting, rasterization, ray/Gaussian scheduling, cache reuse, and mobile/edge frame latency.

claim_text: PIM/CIM evidence is no longer only CNN macro work; it increasingly targets Transformer/LLM attention, KV/cache, long-context inference, and edge fine-tuning.
